_publications._publicationTitle: Inhibition of YAP/TAZ-driven TEAD activity prevents growth of NF2-null schwannoma and meningioma.

_contextSnippet: Counts of total non-neuronal cells per area within the DRG showed increased numbers in NF2 single null animals, which further increased with age
details: Increased numbers of total non-neuronal cells per area within the DRG in NF2 single null animals, which further increased with age
